TestCase.Name: Lint and production build
TestCase.Evidence: npm run lint completed successfully and npm run build completed successfully.

TestCase.Name: Signup success
TestCase.Evidence: POST /api/auth/signup returned 201 with Account created successfully.

TestCase.Name: Duplicate signup
TestCase.Evidence: Repeated signup returned 409 with Account already exists.

TestCase.Name: Invalid login credentials
TestCase.Evidence: POST /api/auth/login with an invalid password returned 401 with Invalid email or password.

TestCase.Name: Login success
TestCase.Evidence: POST /api/auth/login returned 200 and issued auth_token.

TestCase.Name: Session persistence
TestCase.Evidence: GET /api/auth/me with the issued auth_token returned the authenticated user payload.

TestCase.Name: Logout
TestCase.Evidence: POST /api/auth/logout returned 200 and cleared auth_token in the response.

TestCase.Name: Authentication validation
TestCase.Evidence: Invalid signup and login payloads returned 400 validation responses with field errors.

TestCase.Name: Dashboard redirect without session
TestCase.Evidence: GET /dashboard without a session returned 307 redirect to /login?next=%2Fdashboard.

TestCase.Name: Notes redirect without session
TestCase.Evidence: GET /notes without a session returned 307 redirect to /login?next=%2Fnotes.

TestCase.Name: Settings redirect without session
TestCase.Evidence: GET /settings without a session returned 307 redirect to /login?next=%2Fsettings.

TestCase.Name: Authenticated dashboard render
TestCase.Evidence: GET /dashboard with a valid auth_token returned the protected dashboard HTML.

TestCase.Name: Authenticated notes render
TestCase.Evidence: GET /notes with a valid auth_token returned the protected notes HTML.

TestCase.Name: Authenticated settings render
TestCase.Evidence: GET /settings with a valid auth_token returned the protected settings HTML.

TestCase.Name: Note validation
TestCase.Evidence: POST /api/notes with an empty title returned 400 validation failure.

TestCase.Name: Create note
TestCase.Evidence: POST /api/notes returned 201 with a new note payload.

TestCase.Name: Edit note
TestCase.Evidence: PUT /api/notes/{id} returned 200 and updated the note title, description, priority, and updatedAt.

TestCase.Name: Delete note
TestCase.Evidence: DELETE /api/notes/{id} returned 200 and the deleted note no longer appeared in list results.

TestCase.Name: Search notes
TestCase.Evidence: GET /api/notes?search=Alpha returned only matching notes.

TestCase.Name: Priority filter
TestCase.Evidence: GET /api/notes?priority=LOW returned only low-priority notes.

TestCase.Name: Statistics synchronization
TestCase.Evidence: GET /api/dashboard reflected the current note counts after create, edit, and delete operations.

TestCase.Name: Sidebar and settings page
TestCase.Evidence: The rendered HTML included Dashboard, Notes, and Settings navigation items plus the Settings empty state.

TestCase.Name: Responsive layout markup
TestCase.Evidence: The rendered HTML included responsive mobile and desktop navigation variants and responsive utility classes.

TestCase.Name: Labels and focusable controls
TestCase.Evidence: Forms and navigation rendered labels, aria-labels, aria-describedby hooks, and keyboard-focusable buttons/links.

TestCase.Name: No runtime errors or unexpected responses
TestCase.Evidence: Server logs showed only expected 2xx/3xx/4xx responses during QA, with no JavaScript, React, or hydration errors recorded.

Recommendations.Recommendation: Keep the local rate-limit fallback and route guard covered by automated regression tests.
Retain the proxy-based protection for static protected routes to prevent unauthenticated HTML from ever rendering.
When testing locally in a browser, use HTTPS or a secure tunnel if you want secure cookies to behave exactly like production.

ProductionReadiness.Reason: The two QA blockers were fixed, lint and build pass, the protected routes now redirect server-side, and the authentication flow no longer crashes when Upstash is absent.
